name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Creating professional presentations with AI tools often results in bland, templated slides that look machine-made and undermine credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving users AI assistance that respects design integrity, producing slides that look intentional and human-crafted. This saves time without sacrificing the visual quality that stakeholders and clients expect.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that look custom-designed rather than AI-generated
Creating client-facing sales presentations with a distinctive visual style
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks quickly without a designer
Turning written reports or documents into structured slide narratives
